artifacts.summary: Handoff for Phase 1 - strict_intermediate_aux helper created with 5 sorries

partial_progress.details: Added canonicalR_T4_chain and strict_intermediate_aux helper. Removed 320+ lines of deep case-tree. Build passes with 7 sorries (was 6). Blocked on Classical existence proof.

review_reason: Mathematical blocker: Classical existence proof for strict intermediate requires showing quotient collapse under the assumption that all intermediates are equivalent to endpoints. This is a non-trivial well-foundedness or cardinality argument.

completion_data.completion_summary: Restructured strict_intermediate_exists to use bounded-depth helper. Added T4 transitivity lemma. Removed deep case-tree (320+ lines). Blocked on Classical existence proof for filling 7 remaining sorries.
